name: Stakeholder Management
description: Actively manages client and internal stakeholder relationships throughout a project lifecycle — balancing competing priorities, navigating politics, and keeping all parties aligned and invested in project success.

variables.name: stakeholders
variables.description: List of stakeholders with their roles and organizational positions

variables.name: dynamics
variables.description: Known interpersonal dynamics, conflicts, or competing priorities

variables.name: complexity
variables.description: Project complexity level and number of parties involved

variables.name: strategic_importance
variables.description: How strategically important this client/account is to the agency

inputs.name: stakeholders
inputs.description: List of stakeholders with their roles and organizational positions

inputs.name: dynamics
inputs.description: Known interpersonal dynamics, conflicts, or competing priorities

inputs.name: complexity
inputs.description: Project complexity level and number of parties involved

inputs.name: strategic_importance
inputs.description: How strategically important this client/account is to the agency
